title: Arduino IoT Cloud credentials should not be disclosed
description: Arduino IoT Cloud is a platform for connecting and managing IoT devices. Credentials include Client ID and Client Secret for API access. Exposing these allows unauthorized control of IoT devices, reading sensor data, and manipulating device configurations.
recommendation: Remove Arduino IoT credentials from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at app.arduino.cc/iot/api-keys.
impact: Unauthorized control of connected IoT devices, access to sensor data, and ability to modify device configurations.

checks.message: Arduino IoT Cloud client secret detected. Arduino IoT credentials authenticate API access to manage connected devices, read sensor data, control device properties, and manage IoT dashboards. Exposing this secret allows unauthorized control of all connected IoT devices in your account. Rotate immediately at app.arduino.cc/iot/api-keys.
